summary:
All tests pass. The two bugs were in `src/ioctl_handler.c`:

1. **`handle_set_config`** (line 47): No NULL check on `req->value` and no bounds check on `req->value_len` before the `memcpy` — a NULL value or oversized length caused a segfault.
2. **`handle_get_config`** (line 87): No NULL/zero-length check on the output buffer `req->value` before writing into it.

The fix adds the missing guards before any pointer dereference, consistent with how a kernel driver must validate all user-space pointers before use.
